headline: Should Bank of America’s (BAC) Governance Votes and New Debt Issuance Reframe Its Rate‑Risk Narrative?
summary: Earlier this week, Bank of America held its 2026 annual shareholder meeting, where investors rejected proposals for an independent board chair and an animal-welfare risk oversight report, while the bank continued to raise capital through several new senior unsecured fixed‑rate note offerings and an employee stock plan shelf registration of US$2.52 billion. Alongside these governance and funding moves, Bank of America is deepening its role in key areas such as defense-related financing and...

headline: Coinbase Just Got Slammed: Barclays Slashes Price Target to $107 After Q1 Crypto Trading Miss
